name: Q-11 --author defaults to anonymized P0..P3 quartile band per §26 privacy posture
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc","ai_involvement":{"models_used":["sonnet"]},"standards_state":{"g":1},"cost_telemetry":{"tokens_in":100},"decision_provenance":{"adrs":["ADR-1"]}}' > manifest.json && : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1,ADR-2,ADR-3' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 1 --author alice --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(/^P[0-3]$/.test(j.author)?0:1)' && echo banded 1>&2
